title: Greek PM calls for EU-wide ban on social media for under-15s
summary_full: In a video on TikTok, Kyriakos Mitsotakis also said Greece would implement such a ban from 2027
summary_public: In a video on TikTok, Kyriakos Mitsotakis also said Greece would implement such a ban from 2027
